steps.title: Identify the task: find the mean
steps.content: We need to find the mean (average) mass of 5 ruffed lemurs. The data points are: 3,810; 3,810; 3,530; 3,850; 3,550 grams.

steps.title: Sum all the values
steps.content: Add the five masses. Notice two values are identical: $(3,810 + 3,810) + (3,530 + 3,850 + 3,550) = 7,620 + 10,930 = 18,550$ grams.

steps.title: Divide by the count to find the mean
steps.content: The mean equals the sum divided by the number of values: $$\frac{18,550}{5} = 3,710 \text{ grams}$$
